title: fps+pvp
description: FPS + PvP Boost is a lightweight Minecraft modpack designed to maximize performance and give players a competitive edge in PvP. With FPS-boosting optimizations and combat-focused tweaks, it delivers smoother gameplay, better responsiveness, and enhanced vi
body:
Dominate the battlefield with FPS + PvP Boost, the ultimate performance-enhancing modpack built for competitive Minecraft players. Whether you're grinding on practice servers or jumping into intense PvP combat, this pack is optimized for maximum frames per second and smooth gameplay.

🔧 Key Features:

Lightweight performance mods for higher FPS

PvP-focused enhancements like better hit registration, quick switching, and HUD tools

Reduced visual clutter for improved visibility in fights

Low-latency settings and tweaks for faster response times

Compatible with most PvP servers and clients (Lunar, Badlion, etc.)

No unnecessary extras — just pure performance and PvP power. Ideal for UHC, Bed Wars, SkyWars, and duels.
